word: H3943 - לָפַת - lâphath - law-fath' - Take hold

sections.paragraph:
Original: לפת

Transliteration: lâphath

Phonetic: law-fath'

BDB Definition:

  1. to twist, grasp, turn, grasp with a twisting motion
    1. (Qal) to grasp
    2. (Niphal) to twist, weave, wind

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1123

Part(s) of speech: Verb
